common.name: Name
dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.locked_title: Create a business to get started
dashboard.locked_description: You need at least one business before you can use sales, fuel management, and other features.
dashboard.no_station_description: Sales, fuel, and cash flow need a station. Create one to unlock them.
onboarding.title: Get started
onboarding.business_step_description: Set up the business that owns your gas stations. You need at least one business to use the system.
onboarding.station_required: Create a station first to use this feature.
sales.title: Sales
sales.delete_confirm: Delete this sale? Tank volume will not be restored.
sales.no_pumps: No active pumps available. Add a pump under Fuel Management first.
fuel.management_desc: Manage tanks, pumps, fuel types, and deliveries
cash_flow.title: Cash Flow
analytics.title: Sales Analysis
reports.title: Reports
settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your profile and account settings
settings.profile_desc: Update your name and email address
settings.update_password_desc: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure
settings.appearance_desc: Update the appearance settings for your account
settings.resend_verification: Click here to re-send the verification email.
settings.verification_sent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.
delete_user.title: Delete account
delete_user.desc: Delete your account and all of its resources
delete_user.caution: Please proceed with caution, this cannot be undone.
delete_user.confirm_title: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
delete_user.confirm_desc: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will also be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.
two_factor.title: Two-factor authentication
two_factor.enabled_desc: You will be prompted for a secure, random pin during login, which you can retrieve from the TOTP-supported application on your phone.
two_factor.disabled_desc: When you enable two-factor authentication, you will be prompted for a secure pin during login. This pin can be retrieved from a TOTP-supported application on your phone.
two_factor.auth_code_desc: Enter the authentication code provided by your authenticator application.
two_factor.recovery_code_desc: Please confirm access to your account by entering one of your emergency recovery codes.
passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.desc: Manage your passkeys for passwordless sign-in
passkeys.no_passkeys_desc: Add a passkey to sign in without a password
auth.login_desc: Enter your email and password below to log in
auth.register_desc: Enter your details below to create your account
auth.name: Name
auth.forgot_desc: Enter your email to receive a password reset link
auth.reset_desc: Please enter your new password below
auth.confirm_desc: This is a secure area of the application. Please confirm your password before continuing.
auth.verify_desc: Please verify your email address by clicking on the link we just emailed to you.
auth.verification_sent: A new verification link has been sent to the email address you provided during registration.
welcome.description: A complete management platform for gas station owners — track fuel inventory, monitor sales, manage staff shifts, and generate instant reports from one clean dashboard.
welcome.built_for_teams_desc: From daily fuel reconciliation to monthly profit analysis, every tool is right where you need it.
welcome.footer: © :year GS Management · Built with care for station operators.
welcome.feat_fuel_inventory_desc: Monitor tank levels, track deliveries, and get low-stock alerts before you run dry.
welcome.feat_sales_revenue_desc: Real-time pump sales data, shift totals, and daily reconciliation in one view.
welcome.feat_staff_shifts_desc: Schedule attendants, log shift handovers, and track individual performance easily.
welcome.feat_expense_tracking_desc: Record operational costs, maintenance, and petty cash with a clear audit trail.
welcome.feat_reports_analytics_desc: Export daily, weekly, or monthly reports to PDF or Excel with one click.
welcome.feat_role_based_desc: Owner, manager, and attendant roles — each sees exactly what they need.

team.remove_confirm: Remove this user from the business?
team.cannot_remove_owner: The business owner cannot be removed.

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.hero_description: A complete management platform for gas station owners — track fuel inventory, monitor sales, manage staff shifts, and generate instant reports from one clean dashboard.
welcome.features_description: From daily fuel reconciliation to monthly profit analysis, every tool is right where you need it.
welcome.footer_tagline: Built with care for station operators.
welcome.feature_fuel_description: Monitor tank levels, track deliveries, and get low-stock alerts before you run dry.
welcome.feature_sales_description: Real-time pump sales data, shift totals, and daily reconciliation in one view.
welcome.feature_staff_description: Schedule attendants, log shift handovers, and track individual performance easily.
welcome.feature_expense_description: Record operational costs, maintenance, and petty cash with a clear audit trail.
welcome.feature_reports_description: Export daily, weekly, or monthly reports to PDF or Excel with one click.
welcome.feature_access_description: Owner, manager, and attendant roles — each sees exactly what they need.
